query: SELECT id, name, category, description FROM storeItems ORDER BY category, id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JyWN7J3MBWttr5.926298ab7e51 --database iq22PtDDLnfa9zucwBEcgk --execute SELECT id, name, category, description FROM storeItems ORDER BY category, id;

rows.name: Female Fantasy Outfit 1
rows.description: Elegant female fantasy outfit with intricate details. Perfect for RPG and fantasy game characters.

rows.name: Dark Lady Outfit
rows.description: Mysterious dark lady ensemble with flowing dark robes and elegant accessories.

rows.name: Female Knight Armor
rows.description: Full plate armor set for female knights. Highly detailed with metallic shaders.

rows.name: Catwoman Suit
rows.description: Sleek and form-fitting catwoman-style suit. Ideal for action and stealth characters.

rows.name: Warrior Armor
rows.description: Heavy warrior battle armor with battle-worn details. Great for fantasy RPG warriors.

rows.name: Ninja Girl Outfit
rows.description: Agile ninja outfit with cloth simulation-ready design. Perfect for action game characters.

rows.name: Casual Girl Outfit
rows.description: Modern casual outfit for everyday female characters. Clean and versatile design.

rows.name: Dark Knight Armor
rows.description: Imposing dark knight full plate armor. Detailed engravings and dark metallic finish.

rows.name: Male Fantasy Outfit 1
rows.description: Classic male fantasy adventurer outfit. Layered cloth and leather design for RPG heroes.

rows.name: Demon Character
rows.description: Fearsome demon character with horns and dark energy effects. Ready for fantasy games.

rows.name: Swamp Monster
rows.description: Terrifying swamp creature with organic textures and moss details. Great for horror games.

rows.name: Crab Creature
rows.description: Giant crab fantasy creature with articulated claws. Fully rigged for animation.

rows.name: Dracula Character
rows.description: Classic vampire lord with cape and gothic attire. Detailed facial features and cloth simulation.

rows.name: Female Sci-Fi Suit 1
rows.description: Sleek female sci-fi combat suit with energy panel details and futuristic design.

rows.name: Female Sci-Fi Suit 2
rows.description: Advanced female sci-fi exosuit with modular armor plating and glowing accents.

rows.name: Male Sci-Fi Suit 1
rows.description: Rugged male sci-fi tactical suit with heavy armor and utility belt. Ideal for space marines.

rows.name: Mech Suit
rows.description: Full mechanical exosuit with articulated joints and hydraulic details. High-poly mech design.
